summary: Burn Rate Economy Rules verification PASSED. All backend APIs correctly implement burn rate calculation (1% for cash, 5% for PRC users) and mining speed multiplier (100% for cash, 70% for PRC users).

features_tested.GET /api/redemption/calculate-charges?am: PASS - Default 1% burn, burn_inr=12.1, subtotal=1210, total=1222.1
features_tested.Burn formula verification: PASS - Subtotal = Amount + ₹10 Processing + 20% Admin. Burn = burn_rate% × Subtotal
features_tested.GET /api/bank-redeem/denominations: PASS - includes burn_inr, burn_rate_percent, burn_prc in samples

critical_code_review_comments: server.py get_user_burn_rate() correctly returns 1% for cash users and 5% for PRC users
server.py calculate_redemption_charges() correctly applies burn formula: Burn = burn_rate% × Subtotal
mining.py calculate_mining_rate() correctly applies boost_multiplier: 0.70 for PRC, 1.0 for cash
bank_redeem.py get_user_burn_rate_bank() and calculate_total_prc() correctly include burn in calculations
All burn fields (burn_inr, burn_rate_percent, burn_payment_type, burn_prc, subtotal_inr) present in API responses
context_for_next_testing_agent: Burn rate economy rules fully verified. Cash users get 1% burn and 100% mining speed. PRC users get 5% burn and 70% mining speed. Formula: Subtotal = Service + ₹10 Processing + 20% Admin; Burn = burn_rate% × Subtotal; Total = Subtotal + Burn.
